mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show positive mean when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, which forces earnings downgrades and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized strength in consumer demand and residential investment, which drives corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 60-day forward returns in > 55% of historical occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: An upward revision in the index of industrial production reflects immediate capacity utilization gains and supply-side momentum, which triggers short-term algorithmic buying and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases are followed by negative 5-day forward returns in > 50% of cases during tightening cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price inflation above 3.0% forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy stances, which increases equity risk premiums and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL above 3.0 is followed by positive 20-day forward returns in > 65% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands the aggregate wage bill and consumer purchasing power, which supports corporate earnings growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero or negative correlation with 60-day forward returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based economic demand strength, which reduces recession probabilities and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive signal fails to predict positive 20-day returns in > 50% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side weakness and inventory drawdowns, which triggers short-term risk-off positioning and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines below -0.5% are followed by positive 5-day forward returns in > 55% of cases.
